programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe has made a deal with Lucy Wayne the secretary of suave movie star Lane Haggard for them to stay for two weeks at the Shady Rest Incognito as Mr Jones Haggard according to Miss Wayne needs to get some rest and relaxation away from prying public eyes But upon their arrival Miss Wayne believes Uncle Joe has duped her First Uncle Joe has told what seems like the entire valley about their stay

programme.title: Munsters 217
programme.desc: Munsters 217

programme.title: Addams Family 112
programme.desc: Addams Family 112

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaacs friends Mike and Lenore are successful and rich but workaholic Mike neglects his son Suzanne follows Frank who witnessed what happened to someone she cares about Shy Newton Weems dons a costume and kisses girls on board

programme.title: Daktari 316
programme.desc: Daktari 316

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A man collapses at the Harts restaurant table and asks them to protect the man with jade eyes and take him to the temple

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: A uniformed officers strike forces the detectives back into their blues and onto the streets as Cagney and Lacey try to bring an end to the Don Juan Strangler

programme.title: Starsky 309
programme.desc: Starsky 309

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Archangel warns String about a zealous government bureaucrat named DG Bogard who will stop at nothing until he finds Airwolf Dom and Hawke take time out from shooting a military training film to hide Airwolf in a different location before it can be discovered but Bogard catches on to their ruse and tracks Hawke back to the new hideaway To complicate things an eager pilot tails Dom and Hawke in an effort to convince Santini that she deserves a job working for his company

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: An unscrupulous faith healer discovers a powerful glove that turns him into a killer

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Addams 207
programme.desc: Addams 207

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A multi-talented photographer obtains the McCoys permission to take pictures of their farm but Luke becomes jealous when he seems to be focusing most of his attention on Kate

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa has Luke prepared for the worst when it is learned that Kates mother is coming for a visit but everyone is surprised when she arrives and repeatedly chides Kate for being insufficiently attentive to Lukes needs

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a famous New York artist is sent to paint a portrait of Hannah Shaw they find the artist is not longer the person they were requesting Lucas will try to help the down-on-his-luck artist

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas help a young man muted by a traumatic past

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E20 The Bad One
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E20 The Bad One

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: It has been more than forty years since Nick has seen his close friend Katherine Barrington and her secretary Madelyn Pinchot

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack track down a cursed scalpel that has found its way into the hands of a talented surgeon

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A prisoner George De La Pena is due for parole after serving time in prison only to be haunted by his past before his release Meanwhile the prison warden John Milford tests an illegal drug for his own personal gain

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A model desperate for fame hooks up with a crazed fashion photographer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Overbearing control freak Jeremy and his long-suffering wife Julie are a squabbling young rich couple who encounter unexpected trouble in the form of a scruffy biker and his pregnant girlfriend while embarking on a road trip to Sunnyvale Can a surprise journey through time enable the obsessive Jeremy to successfully avert a tragic disaster

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric jumps a train in his quest for Skorzeny He finds a band of hobos who are suspicious of him when one of their members has his throat slit while they sleep

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: When a werewolf murders some homeless kids Eric tracks it to a mall and finds a homeless girl living there He runs out of silver bullets and fashions a silver crossbow arrow slaying the werewolf Only to find that its the homeless girl

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After approaching a convicted fugitive Nick is convinced of her innocence but must prove it before she is put to death

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men must destroy a German anti-aircraft artillery unit so that the Allies can send in a bombing raid on Hitlers birthday

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have stolen a gold shipment from the French and Hogan must convince Klink to have it moved to the safety of Stalag 13

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew devise a plan - Potentially beneficial to both them and Captain Binghamton - To have a popular movie star put on a show on Taratupa for Admiral Rogers but must first scheme to get the Stars stubborn Tour Manager out of the way

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress an Admiral Binghamton drops some serious charges against the 73 Crew in return for a show of their high esteem for their Commander in the form of a testimonial dinner Knowing that no one will attend the dinner willingly McHale and The Boys plan to combine the dinner with a big crap game in order to have a showing for the most hated Commanding Officer in the Pacific

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers conned into signing a contract for dancing lessons

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter must decide whether or not to re-enlist

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Determined to fit into a tight Anniversary Dress and concerned that she is taking after her corpulent Aunt Bessie Kate embarks upon a crash program of diet and exercise

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After breaking a date with Tommy Hassie takes things out on her family

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is working undercover on a ship trying to find the plans of a super-secret weapon

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must retrieve some secret plans that are sewn into a dress according to a model

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ goes from riding a rig to riding horseback when he helps a young Indian brave protect the regions wild horses from a corrupt rancher

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie falls for Jack Chenault but will she move to Alaska with him Twins Judy and Joanie unhappy with marriage consider switching husbands Separated ventriloquists Mike and Pat Harmon are in the same cabin and entertain in the lounge

programme.title: WKRP 118
programme.desc: WKRP 118

programme.title: WKRP 109
programme.desc: WKRP 109

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Evan and Fontanas wedding day arrives and Marlene prepares to meet the child she put up for adoption when she was a teenager

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman discovers he has a secret admirer

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Vega

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jonathan and Jennifer are in Hawaii for a croquet tournament when a tournament official is stabbed and the Harts wind up in an international dilemma involving the KGB MI-6 the CIA and a fancy key that may unlock deadly secrets

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Joanna pressures Dick into being spontaneous but disaster strikes when they take off on a spur-of-the-moment trip

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: After an argument with Joanna Dick spends the rest of the night trying to find a place to sleep

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: The Majors dad turns out to have not left town quite yet giving them both a chance to hopefully work out their differences

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds a young jungle boy on the island as well as a helium supply that the professor plans to use to get rescued with a makeshift hot-air balloon

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch Garner and Ryan investigate a family dispute which results in a wife accusing her husband of corporate embezzlement and giving him the reason to erase her The detectives have to find the man before he can carry out his plan

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: On a planned de-stressing holiday Arcane is attacked by an old enemy who is supposed to be locked away in an asylum But LaRoche is a master of hypnotism and forces unlikely allies to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans joy turns to horror when the first child born on the Alpha matures into a five year old in a matter of hours This is only a prelude to the arrival of formless alien fugitives- who plan to inhabit Alphas population

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.title: Hercules 201
programme.desc: Hercules 201

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Paul Chandler plots an attack on the Taelon Embassy in DC with the ship he stole from Lili He begs her to join him in beginning an all out war

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two spoilt rich girls inveigle Will against his will into taking them into the swamp so they can perform a ritual to give them three wishes In the course of teaching them a lesson in humility Will makes a discovery about himself

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A friendly country girl has a crush on Kimble and wants to help him escape on the condition she can go with him as the Sheriff and Lt Gerard close in on them

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: Nick and Heath on the trail of a gang of murderous raiders stealing horses in the Valley enlist the help of the ex-sheriff of Stockton The motivation behind his help proves interesting and totally unexpected-especially to the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne brings a body into town killed in a strange way The townspeople suspect Cheyenne is part of a rustler gang While Cheyenne is hunting for the killer a girls jealous boyfriend is hunting Cheyenne thinking he killed his brother

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A schizophrenic nightclub entertainer dresses up as a famous torch singer

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps Co continue their plan to smash the renegade slavery operation of the absolute ruler of a Middle Eastern nation Phelps posing as a slave trader works his way into the confidence of the ruler In that role Phelps sells Cinnamon into slavery Meanwhile the rest of the IMF team is preparing to pull a switch that will force the rulers brother to confront the situation and force the end of slavery in his nation

programme.desc: Three astronauts are set to go on a space mission to Mars However when they detect a critical failure in the spaceship NASA asks them to film a fake landing to avoid public humiliation

programme.title: I Come in Peace
programme.desc: A rebel police officer Jack Caines wants to bring an end to the drug trade and its top supplier Victor Manning Jack teams up with an FBI agent to launch an undercover operation to entrap Victor

programme.desc: Kevin and the N Team are off to Hyrule to meet Kevins favorite game hero Link and Princess Zelda Mother Brain gives the Potion of Power to Gannon that restores an evil wizard to his rightful form

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger uses a time portal to change Earths history The team must stop him or they themselves may cease to exist

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids meet Lorn - an orphan boy with a magic talisman - and invite him to join the team But Lorns talisman is more dangerous than any of them realizes

programme.desc: Inspector Gadget protects Fang the Wonderdog from MAD who wants to kidnap Fang and make millions in ransom

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: In search of a message from Audric Jayce lands on a planet protected by telepathic plants which keep the planet concealed Saw Boss makes a deal with a wicket wizard who has put a sleeping spell on the princess who controls the plants

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root

programme.desc: VENOM steals the Book of Power which is the key to the Lost City of Mong Paco and its giant jewel-covered idol
